items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Generic typed-columns data table — composable column definitions, no client state, host-owned data.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: data-table-fixtures
items.title: Data Table (with fixtures)
items.description: Data Table bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo. Resolves the base data-table item automatically.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: rich-card
items.title: Rich Card
items.description: JSON-driven recursive card-tree viewer + structural editor. Drag-drop reordering, bulk multi-select, per-level/per-card/per-key permissions, custom predefined-key registration, native search, validation hooks, undo/redo.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: rich-card-fixtures
items.title: Rich Card (with fixtures)
items.description: Rich Card bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: workspace
items.title: Workspace
items.description: Splittable canvas — corner-drag split/merge, edge-drag resize, registry-driven content, responsive collapse with per-breakpoint depth cap.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: workspace-fixtures
items.title: Workspace (with fixtures)
items.description: Workspace bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: properties-form
items.title: Properties Form
items.description: Schema-driven controlled read/edit form. Six built-in field types, three-state permissions per field, sync validation with first-error focus, custom-renderer slot, async submit with delayed spinner.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: properties-form-fixtures
items.title: Properties Form (with fixtures)
items.description: Properties Form bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: detail-panel
items.title: Detail Panel
items.description: Selection-aware compound container — DetailPanel.Header / .Body / .Actions via React Context. Composite re-key on selection change, sticky header + sticky footer-actions, three mode configurations (controlled / uncontrolled / locked dev-warn), lifecycle precedence error > loading > content > empty.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: detail-panel-fixtures
items.title: Detail Panel (with fixtures)
items.description: Detail Panel bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: filter-stack
items.title: Filter Stack
items.description: Schema-driven controlled filter panel. Four built-in filter types (checkbox-list / toggle / text / custom), AND-across-categories with host-defined within-category semantics, mode toggle (Union/Intersection), per-option solo, debounced text with flush-on-blur + ESC-clears, custom-render slot with error boundary.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: filter-stack-fixtures
items.title: Filter Stack (with fixtures)
items.description: Filter Stack bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: entity-picker
items.title: Entity Picker
items.description: Searchable typed picker — single OR multi mode via mode prop with TS function overloads, kind badges via kinds map, three custom-render slots, multi-mode chip cluster with Backspace-on-empty-search-removes-last, controlled-or-uncontrolled open state, id-set selection equality.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: entity-picker-fixtures
items.title: Entity Picker (with fixtures)
items.description: Entity Picker bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: markdown-editor
items.title: Markdown Editor
items.description: CodeMirror 6 substrate with three view modes (edit / split / preview), default 8-item toolbar, [[wikilink]] autocomplete + decoration via CM6 StateField, per-instance Marked() preview parsing, Cmd/Ctrl+S onSave, echo-guarded value sync, container-query stacking.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: markdown-editor-fixtures
items.title: Markdown Editor (with fixtures)
items.description: Markdown Editor bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (12-node graph fixture for wikilink demos).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: content-card-news-01
items.title: Content Card (News 01)
items.description: Magazine-style content card with 5 visual variants (featured / large / medium / small / list). Polymorphic root, soft-fail item shape, overlay-link pattern with optional actions slot, fully customizable formatting and theming. Default serif via the pro-ui --font-serif token (Playfair Display).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: content-card-news-01-fixtures
items.title: Content Card (News 01) — fixtures
items.description: Content Card (News 01) bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (8 demo articles + sample categoryStyles map).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: newsletter-card-01
items.title: Newsletter Card 01
items.description: Brand-tinted CTA card with email signup. Two variants (inline-form / cta-only), three tones, controlled-or-uncontrolled email value, async-aware status auto-tracking, full i18n via labels prop.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: newsletter-card-01-fixtures
items.title: Newsletter Card 01 — fixtures
items.description: Newsletter Card 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (Turkish labels + fake submit handlers for demo).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: category-cloud-01
items.title: Category Cloud 01
items.description: Always-visible flex-wrap of clickable category chips with optional inline counts. Single-select, controlled-or-uncontrolled, toggleable, native button semantics with aria-pressed.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: category-cloud-01-fixtures
items.title: Category Cloud 01 — fixtures
items.description: Category Cloud 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (Turkish + English category samples with counts).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: filter-bar-01
items.title: Filter Bar 01
items.description: Composite filter bar with centered search + category pill row + date-range Popover + optional results count. Each sub-control independently controlled-or-uncontrolled. Sub-control hide flags for partial usage.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: filter-bar-01-fixtures
items.title: Filter Bar 01 — fixtures
items.description: Filter Bar 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (Turkish labels + Turkish-locale date-range formatter).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: page-hero-news-01
items.title: Page Hero (News 01)
items.description: Full-bleed gradient hero band with badge / title / highlight / description / children slot. Reveal-on-mount via the project's CSS keyframe (no framer-motion). Includes a HeroStats sub-component for the icon-value-label triplet.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: page-hero-news-01-fixtures
items.title: Page Hero (News 01) — fixtures
items.description: Page Hero (News 01) bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (English + Turkish defaults + 3-stat row content).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: grid-layout-news-01
items.title: Grid Layout (News 01)
items.description: Slot-based magazine layout — optional hero / filter bar / sidebar + a generic main-column tower (1 large + 2-up + N-up medium grid) + IntersectionObserver-driven infinite scroll. Generic over item type. Companion useMagazineFilter hook for in-memory filter + page state.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: grid-layout-news-01-fixtures
items.title: Grid Layout (News 01) — fixtures
items.description: Grid Layout (News 01) bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (14 demo articles for the magazine tower + featured demo).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: author-card-01
items.title: Author Card 01
items.description: Card-framed person identity block — avatar (image OR icon fallback), name, role, optional bio. Optionally clickable as a whole via polymorphic root + href. 3 tones, custom fallback icon, configurable heading level, i18n via labels.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: author-card-01-fixtures
items.title: Author Card 01 — fixtures
items.description: Author Card 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (5 sample authors covering image / no-image / collective / clickable / Turkish).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: thumb-list-01
items.title: Thumb List 01
items.description: Linked thumbnail-list block — small image + title + meta line per row, each row a single link target. Frame toggle, polymorphic link, custom render-meta slot, empty state, i18n via labels.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: Single-metric dashboard widget — value + label + optional delta + optional sparkline. 3 variants (default / compact / detailed); object-shape callbacks; built-in pure-SVG sparkline (no charting peer dep); polarity-aware coloring via betterIsHigher.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: thumb-list-01-fixtures
items.title: Thumb List 01 — fixtures
items.description: Thumb List 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (3 sets — default / Turkish / dated for renderMeta example).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: stat-card-fixtures
items.title: Stat Card — fixtures
items.description: Stat Card bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (revenue / errorRate / activeUsers / latency / signups / uptime).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: article-meta-01
items.title: Article Meta 01
items.description: Horizontal strip of icon + value pairs surfacing key metadata (author / date / read-time / view-count) under an article title. Data-driven items, optional per-item link, optional bottom divider, 3 alignments.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: article-meta-01-fixtures
items.title: Article Meta 01 — fixtures
items.description: Article Meta 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (5 sample item sets covering article header / centered / docs / video / text-only).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: share-bar-01
items.title: Share Bar 01
items.description: Horizontal cluster of social-share buttons + copy-link with success-state feedback. 9 built-in platforms (Twitter / Facebook / LinkedIn / Reddit / WhatsApp / Telegram / Email / Threads / Bluesky), custom targets, analytics hook.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: share-bar-01-fixtures
items.title: Share Bar 01 — fixtures
items.description: Share Bar 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (4 sample target sets — default / full 9-platform / compact 2-target / Turkish).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: article-body-01
items.title: Article Body 01
items.description: Plate-based WYSIWYG rich-text editor + RSC-friendly read-only viewer. Fixed + floating toolbars, syntax-highlighted code blocks (lowlight), resizable images with inline captions, HTML export. Two exports from one folder: ArticleBodyEditor (~165KB, client) + ArticleBodyViewer (~32KB, server-renderable). JSON-as-storage.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: article-body-01-fixtures
items.title: Article Body 01 — fixtures
items.description: Article Body 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (5 sample article values — rich / simple / empty / table / code-block).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: event-card-01
items.title: Event Card 01
items.description: Event preview card with a 6-state status state machine (open / upcoming / lastSpots / ongoing / full / expired) and 4 visual variants (grid / feed / list / compact). Polymorphic root, soft-failure item shape, overlay-link pattern, fully customizable. Public helper kernel exports for status / formatting reuse outside the card.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: schedule-list-01
items.title: Schedule List 01
items.description: Vertical time-anchored agenda — time + title + optional description rows. Polymorphic per-row link, optional icons, time-range support, framed/bare toggle, custom renderItem slot.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: progress-timeline-01
items.title: Progress Timeline 01
items.description: Horizontal progress bar with marker dot at current % + 3-caption row (start / dynamic state-aware center / end). Auto-derives 3-state machine (before/active/after) from start + end + now. Public helper kernel for state reuse outside the card.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: info-list-01
items.title: Info List 01
items.description: Card-framed icon-prefixed details list — vertical rows of icon + primary + optional secondary + optional action. Two variants (comfortable / compact), polymorphic per-row link, frame toggle, separator toggle, custom renderItem slot.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: people-grid-01
items.title: People Grid 01
items.description: Section heading + responsive N-column grid of person cards (round avatar + name + title). Initials fallback when image is missing. Polymorphic per-card link, configurable columns / avatar size / alignment, custom renderItem slot. Public getInitials helper kernel.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: registration-card-01
items.title: Registration Card 01
items.description: Card-framed registration status display — capacity progress + spots-left counter + status-aware primary CTA + optional share / actions slot. 4-state state machine (open / lastSpots / full / closed). Public helper kernel for status reuse outside the card.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: expandable-text-01
items.title: Expandable Text 01
items.description: Truncate-and-expand plain-text block — measure-based detection (toggle only renders when truncation actually occurs), configurable maxLines, controlled-or-uncontrolled expand state, custom toggle slot, public useLineClampDetect hook. First ship in the social-posts-system arc.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: expandable-text-01-fixtures
items.title: Expandable Text 01 — fixtures
items.description: Expandable Text 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (4 sample strings — short EN, long EN, short TR, long TR — for demo and smoke-test scenarios).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: video-player-01
items.title: Video Player 01
items.description: <video> wrapper with muted-autoplay-friendly defaults, slot-based controls via renderControls(state), isActive auto-pause for carousel coordination, double-tap callback, caption tracks, rAF-throttled onTimeUpdate, full lifecycle callbacks, and a public useDoubleTap hook export. Second ship in the social-posts-system arc; first occupant of the media category.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: video-player-01-fixtures
items.title: Video Player 01 — fixtures
items.description: Video Player 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (5 royalty-free Pexels video URLs + a sample WebVTT track entry for caption demos).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: media-carousel-01
items.title: Media Carousel 01
items.description: Embla-driven image+video carousel with two variants (gallery peek-scale / linear snap). Composes video-player-01 for video items via the isActive contract — first cross-folder import in the registry; videos in inactive slides pause cleanly. Single-item shortcut bypasses Embla. Built-in image + video handlers + renderItem slot. Imperative ref handle. Third ship in the social-posts-system arc.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: media-carousel-01-fixtures
items.title: Media Carousel 01 — fixtures
items.description: Media Carousel 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (mixed image+video set for kasder gallery demo, photos-only product gallery set, and single-item samples).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: engagement-bar-01
items.title: Engagement Bar 01
items.description: Discriminated-union action row (like / comment / share / bookmark / view-count / custom) with realtime subscribe contract, sibling RSC heart-burst sub-export (CSS-keyframe driven via registry:file), per-action controlled vs uncontrolled mode, slot-based likers preview, and three variants (default / compact / stacked). No framer-motion. Highest-leverage primitive in the social-posts-system arc; retrofits cleanly into news-card-01 + event-card-01 actions slots. Fourth ship in the social-posts-system arc.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: engagement-bar-01-fixtures
items.title: Engagement Bar 01 — fixtures
items.description: Engagement Bar 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (post / news-card / video-overlay action sets, sample like users, and a synthetic createDummySubscribe for sandbox realtime demos).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: comment-thread-01
items.title: Comment Thread 01
items.description: Recursive comment tree with composer + realtime. Composes expandable-text-01 (long bodies) + engagement-bar-01 compact (per-row like). Inline-expand past maxDepth, optimistic add/like/delete, autosize composer with Enter-submit / Shift+Enter newline / Escape cancel keyboard ergonomics, Subscribe<CommentDelta> realtime contract, kebab with own-only Delete + Report defaults (commentActions slot for full takeover), renderNode / renderViewReplies / renderComposer slots, imperative reset() / dispatch() escape hatches for external state sync. No framer-motion, no react-textarea-autosize peer dep, no date-fns peer dep. Fifth ship in the social-posts-system arc.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: comment-thread-01-fixtures
items.title: Comment Thread 01 — fixtures
items.description: Comment Thread 01 bundle including dummy-data fixtures (flat / nested-depth-2 / nested-depth-3 / large-paginated comment trees, viewer fixture, page generator, and a synthetic createDummySubscribe for sandbox realtime demos).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: post-card-01
items.title: Post Card 01
items.description: Tier-2 social-post composite — composes expandable-text-01 + media-carousel-01 + engagement-bar-01 + comment-thread-01 (detail) + video-player-01 (transitive). 4 variants (feed / compact / list / detail), auto-wired heart-burst on double-tap, default engagement actions + kebab builders, slot-based render escape hatches at every connective seam, optional overlay-link via getHref. Always-uncontrolled with reset() imperative escape hatch. No framer-motion. Sixth ship in the social-posts-system arc.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: post-card-01-fixtures
items.title: Post Card 01 — fixtures
items.description: Post Card 01 bundle including dummy-data fixtures (text-only / single-image / multi-image / video / mixed-media / featured / long-text posts, detail-mode comment thread, viewer, and synthetic engagement + comment subscribe factories for sandbox realtime demos).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: story-rail-01
items.title: Story Rail 01
items.description: Horizontal stories rail (kasder-exact) — gradient ring on unread, muted ring on read; AddStoryThumbnail standalone export + leading slot; Embla used inline (drag-free skim-scroll, no indicator dots); mode-aware edge-fade gradients (framed vs bare); realtime via Subscribe<StoryRailDelta>. Always-uncontrolled with reset() + dispatch() + markViewed() imperative escape hatches. Click does NOT auto-mark-viewed (matches Instagram). Decoupled from the viewer — onItemClick hands off to host. Seventh ship in the social-posts-system arc.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: story-rail-01-fixtures
items.title: Story Rail 01 — fixtures
items.description: Story Rail 01 bundle including dummy-data fixtures (7 mock users matching kasder verbatim, viewer-avatar fixture, and a synthetic createDummyStoryRailSubscribe for sandbox realtime demos).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: story-viewer-01
items.title: Story Viewer 01
items.description: Full-screen sequential story viewer — Radix Dialog modal with segmented progress, tap zones, multi-story nav arrows, keyboard nav, accumulator-based pause-preserving timer (fixes kasder's pause drift), ID-anchored cursor (insertion-stable), Subscribe<StoryViewerDelta> realtime contract, video-player-01 composition for video items, renderItem slot. Forward-only onStoryViewed semantics (matches Instagram). Always-uncontrolled with reset() + dispatch() + goToStory/goToItem/setPaused imperative escape hatches. v0.1 ships pure CSS animations; framer-motion swipe-to-dismiss is the locked v0.2 adoption gate. Eighth (and final) ship in the social-posts-system arc.
items.author: ilinxa

items.title: Story Viewer 01 — fixtures
items.description: Story Viewer 01 bundle including dummy-data fixtures (3 mock stories with mixed image+video items; w3schools video URLs matching kasder verbatim).

items.description: Registration Card 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (5 capacity-state samples + Turkish + fundraising relabels).

items.title: Progress Timeline 01 — fixtures
items.description: Progress Timeline 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (3 timeline shapes — before / active / after — plus a fixed dummyNow reference for deterministic SSR).

items.title: Schedule List 01 — fixtures
items.description: Schedule List 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (English + Turkish parallel 6-item schedules with icon / time-range / href samples).

items.title: Event Card 01 — fixtures
items.description: Event Card 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (8 events covering all 6 statuses + Turkish-localized parallel array + 4 type-style maps + dummyNow reference date).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: project-card-01
items.title: Project Card 01
items.description: Project / case-study preview card with 3-state editorial status (completed / ongoing / planned) and 2 visual variants (grid / feature). Polymorphic root, soft-failure item shape, overlay-link pattern, fully customizable. Public PROJECT_STATUS_CONFIG export for status-color / label reuse outside the card.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: project-card-01-fixtures
items.title: Project Card 01 — fixtures
items.description: Project Card 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (6 projects covering all 3 statuses + featured + image-fallback edge + Turkish-localized parallel array + 2 category-style maps + Turkish labels).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: kanban-board-01
items.title: Kanban Board 01
items.description: Column-based board with drag-and-drop, swimlanes, color-tinted columns, and a pluggable renderer registry that hosts any card kind as a first-class item. Items are pure JSON; built-in renderers ship for kanban-card and kanban-note, and any sibling rich component (e.g. rich-card) can be registered as a third renderer with full feature passthrough via the dragHandle="header" pattern. Per-column movement controls, per-item lock, optional CRUD, collapsible columns, soft maxItems cap, native column scroll.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: kanban-board-01-fixtures
items.title: Kanban Board 01 — fixtures
items.description: Kanban Board 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo (4 columns covering todo / doing / blocked / done, 2 swimlanes, mixed card + note items, 1 locked item, color-coded columns, soft maxItems cap, acceptsRendererIds restriction).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: flow-canvas-01
items.title: Flow Canvas 01
items.description: Node-and-edge canvas with typed ports, three keystone registries (renderer / port-type / edge-type), recursive sub-object rendering, and JSON-based save/load — built on @xyflow/react. Every node carries a __type field that keys into a renderer registry; unknown shapes fall back to a built-in custom-JSON renderer. Ports live inside the node data (recursively) so sub-objects can be extracted as standalone nodes through the same drop pipeline. Pan / zoom / fit-to-view, gradient background, controlled + uncontrolled state, imperative export ref, typed connection validation, multi-edge per port, sub-object drag-extract, read-only mode preserving pan / zoom / select.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: flow-canvas-01-fixtures
items.title: Flow Canvas 01 — fixtures
items.description: Flow Canvas 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo (sample nodes + edges exercising the renderer / port-type / edge-type registries, sub-object drag extraction, and the custom-JSON fallback).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: pdf-viewer
items.title: PDF Viewer
items.description: Drop-in PDF reader with toolbar, zoom, selectable text, drag-drop, and right-click context menu — themed to your design system, no commercial SDK.
items.author: ilinxa

items.title: PDF Viewer — fixtures

items.description: VS Code-style hierarchical file tree with format-aware icons, full CRUD, drag-and-drop, lazy children, and multi-select.

items.description: Tiny shared clipboard primitive consumed by file-manager (and file-tree starting v0.2.0). Provides FileClipboardProvider + useFileClipboard hook. Wrap multiple file-* components under the provider to sync cut/copy/paste across instances.

items.name: file-manager
items.title: File Manager
items.description: Mac Finder-style file + folder browser with grid / list views, multi-select with marquee, cut/copy/paste, drag-and-drop, and a shared clipboard primitive.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: file-manager-fixtures
items.title: File Manager — fixtures
items.description: File Manager bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo (Next.js project shape + flat-grid asset library + 250-item virtualization-stress fixture).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Language-agnostic code surface with view / edit / terminal modes, Shiki syntax highlighting, dual-theme CSS-variable theming, streaming-friendly tokenization, line highlights, annotations, copy / wrap / expand / download chrome, and full keyboard a11y.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: code-block-fixtures
items.title: Code Block — fixtures
items.description: Code Block bundle including the dummy-data fixtures used by the docs-site demo (TS sample + JSON + Python + terminal lines + long-block + error trace + annotations).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: json-form
items.title: Json Form
items.description: Schema-driven form renderer — declarative field DSL compiled to Zod, 25 built-in field types (incl. `richtext` via Plate), conditional + computed fields, extensible renderer registry, RHF v7 + zod v4 substrate. Cross-registry deps on @ilinxa/code-block (lazy `code` field) and @ilinxa/article-body-01 (lazy `richtext` field).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: json-form-fixtures
items.title: Json Form — fixtures
items.description: Json Form bundle including 6 named fixture schemas (registration / contact / conditional / computed / rich fields / admin user) plus the `mockFetchSchema` async helper for backend-driven demos.
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: rich-card-in-flow
items.title: Rich Card in Flow
items.description: Read-only RichCardViewer renderer for flow-canvas-01 nodes + consumer-owned-dialog pattern for editing rich-card content inside canvas nodes. v0.2 adds PortEditorStrip — opt-in port editor (id / type / side / dir / multi / label) per card or subcard with live-save, [✓in][✓out] atomic-row create-flow, doc-type bottom-side enforcement, and orphan-doc-target tooltips. Canonical implementation of the popup-edit renderer convention from flow-canvas-01@v0.2.0 perf description Q33. Cross-registry deps on @ilinxa/rich-card (editor) and @ilinxa/flow-canvas-01@^0.2.5 (host; requires built-in 'doc' port type).
items.author: ilinxa

items.name: rich-card-in-flow-fixtures
items.title: Rich Card in Flow — fixtures
items.description: Rich Card in Flow bundle including the agent-workflow demo fixture (3 rich-card nodes + 1 custom-json audit-log node + connecting edges) used by the docs-site demo.
items.author: ilinxa
